title: EW optimized
description: Enhanced gameplay, beautiful graphics, and quality-of-life features, perfect for singleplayer or multiplayer!
body:
# EW optimized 
*Minecraft the way it should run - fast, beautiful, and packed with quality-of-life improvements, without changing what makes it Minecraft.*
 
---
 
## What is EW Optimized?
 
EW Optimized is a curated Fabric modpack built to squeeze every drop of performance out of Minecraft 1.20.1, while layering on visual enhancements and quality-of-life features that make the game feel polished and modern. No fluff, no game-changing content mods - just a rock-solid foundation that works great for both singleplayer and multiplayer.
 
Whether you're building, exploring, or playing on a server with friends, EW Optimized makes sure the game gets out of its own way.
 
---
 
## ⚡ Performance
 
A full stack of the best optimization mods available, working together:
 
- **Sodium** - Overhauled rendering engine for massive FPS improvements
- **Lithium** - Deep game logic optimizations with no gameplay changes
- **FerriteCore** - Cuts RAM usage significantly
- **ImmediatelyFast** - Optimizes all immediate mode rendering
- **ModernFix** - Wide-ranging performance and memory improvements
- **Krypton** - Optimizes the network stack for smoother multiplayer
- ⚙️ **C2ME + Noisium** - Faster chunk generation and loading
- **Entity Culling + More Culling** - Skip rendering what you can't see
- **Enhanced Block Entities** - Faster chest, sign and banner rendering
- **Debugify** - Fixes confirmed, unresolved vanilla Minecraft bugs
- **Dynamic FPS** - Reduces resource usage when the game is in the background
- **Memory Leak Fix + BadOptimizations** - Stability and memory cleanup
---
 
## 🎨 Visuals
 
Looks better without needing a shader - though shader support is included:
 
- 🌅 **Distant Horizons** - LOD rendering for massive view distances without the FPS cost. The world stretches to the horizon even on mid-range hardware
- **Photon Shader** - A performance-friendly shader preset bundled and ready to enable via Iris
- **Iris Shaders** - Full shader support, compatible with Optifine shaders
- **LambDynamicLights** - Torches and glowing items light up the world while held
- **Continuity** - Connected textures support
- **Entity Texture & Model Features** - Enables OptiFine-style entity texture variety
- **3D Skin Layers** - Your skin's outer layer rendered in full 3D
- **Falling Leaves** - Gentle leaf particles drifting from trees
- **Better Clouds** - Smoother, more natural-looking clouds
- **Particle Rain** - Improved rain and weather particles
- **Not Enough Animations** - More player animations for movement and actions
- **Eating Animation** - Proper eating animations in first person
- **First Person Model** - See your own body in first person view
---
 
## 🛠️ Quality of Life
 
Small changes that make a big difference day-to-day:
 
- **EMI** - Clean, fast recipe viewer with enchanting, loot, ore and trade addons
- **Zoomify** - Smooth, configurable zoom
- **AppleSkin** - See hunger and saturation values on food
- **Mouse Tweaks** - Improved inventory click and drag behaviour
- **Smooth Scroll + Smooth Swapping** - Polished inventory feel
- **Better F3** - Colour-coded, readable debug screen
- **Better Advancements** - Full-screen advancement view
- **Better Stats** - Overhauled statistics screen
- **Better Combat** - Improved combat feel and weapon animations
- **Easy Anvils** - Removes the too-expensive limit and other anvil annoyances
- **Clumps** - XP orbs group together for less lag and easier pickup
- **Sound Physics Remastered** - Reverb and occlusion for realistic sound
- 🎧 **Immersive Thunder** - More natural, distance-based thunder sounds
- **Litematica** - Schematic and blueprint tool for builders
---
 
## FAQ
 
> **Q: Does this work on multiplayer servers?**
>
> **A:** Yes, EW Optimized is fully compatible with vanilla and modded servers. All mods are client-friendly.
 
> **Q: What Minecraft version and mod loader?**
>
> **A:** **Minecraft 1.20.1** on **Fabric**. Make sure you're using the latest Fabric Loader.
 
> **Q: How much RAM should I allocate?**
>
> **A:** Thanks to FerriteCore and ModernFix, **4 GB** is comfortable. 6 GB if you run heavy shaders.
 
> **Q: Will this work with my shaders / resource packs?**
>
> **A:** Yes, Iris handles OptiFine-compatible shaders, and Continuity + CIT Resewn handle connected textures and custom item textures.
 
> **Q: Where can I report bugs or get help?**
>
> **A:** (WIP)
